name: Shrimp Newburg
recipeInstructions:
1. Make white sauce by melting butter in a saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add flour and cook, stirring constantly, until it bubbles.
3. Cook for one minute while continuing to stir.
4. Gradually add onions, stirring continuously.
5. Slowly add milk, whisking constantly, until the mixture thickens.
6. Add peeled raw shrimp, pimentos, and liquid from one can of pimento.
7. Stir in 2 tablespoons Lea & Perrins sauce, dissolved beef bouillon cubes in hot water, chopped onion tops, dry mustard, and Tabasco sauce.
8. Remove from heat and gently stir in beaten egg and cream.
9. Serve immediately over cooked shrimp. Mushrooms are optional.
